metadata.summary: A micro CMS for static websites with a focus on good navigation practices.

functions.name: urubu.processors.skip_yamlfm
documentation: Return source of a file without yaml frontmatter.

methods.name: urubu.processors.ContentProcessor.process
documentation:
Process the content.

Conversion and rendering are done in separate phases, so
that the full content is available to the rendering process.

modules.name: urubu._compat
documentation:
jinja2._compat
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

Some py2/py3 compatibility support based on a stripped down
version of six so we don't have to depend on a specific version
of it.

:copyright: Copyright 2013 by the Jinja team, see AUTHORS.
:license: BSD, see LICENSE for details.
-*- coding: utf-8 -*-
